title: Framework teaching adoption = verify templates/commands/ only; WAI-Spoke/ is spoke infrastructure
description: When adopting teachings on the framework spoke, check templates/commands/ (project scope). If change already present, move teaching to processed without edits. Never modify WAI-Spoke/ as part of project development work. WAI-Spoke/ is session infrastructure only.
rationale: Prevents scope confusion for future agents working on the framework. The framework generates teachings for downstream spokes but is always ahead of its own teachings — adoption here is a verification pass.
